title: French Casserole with Sweet Tomatoes
description: A delicious and easy-to-make French-inspired casserole recipe featuring sweet tomatoes.
instructions: In a large skillet, sauté the onions until softened.
In a separate bowl, combine the cubed tofu and cooked onions.
In a greased 9x13-inch casserole dish, arrange half of the bread cubes.
Add the tofu mixture and top with the remaining bread cubes.
Pour the canned tomatoes over the bread and tofu layers.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes.
Let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
